sections.content:
Good, I cleared the 3 remaining green blocks in the bottom row. Now the bottom row is completely clear. Let me check the current state to see what remains.
Looking at the current image:
- Top: 4 green blocks
- Middle: 3 purple blocks
- Below purple: 1 row of 7 green blocks
- Bottom: player area (clear)
So the bottom row of green blocks is now cleared. I still need to clear:
- 4 green blocks at the top (rows 1-5)
- 7 green blocks in the middle row (rows 31-35)
Let me continue clearing the remaining green blocks. I'll start with the middle row (rows 31-35).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Green blocks (N):")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nPurple blocks (p):")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
        print(f"  rows={min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols={min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
